qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Attempt blocked. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳射门被封堵。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Saud Abdulhamid.
Attempt missed. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Pau Cubarsí.

events.description: 亚马尔射门偏出。 保罗·库巴尔西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Abdullah Al Khaibari.
Attempt missed. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Álex Baena following a corner.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射门偏出。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Feras Al Brikan (Saudi Arabia).

events.description: 费拉斯·阿尔布里肯犯规。

events.description: 亚马尔 进球，奥亚萨瓦尔 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Pedro Porro (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Lamine Yamal.

events.description: 佩德罗·波罗射门偏出。 亚马尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Pedri (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the box is too high.
Attempt missed. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Aymeric Laporte.

events.description: 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳射门偏出。 艾默里克·拉波尔特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Álex Baena (Spain).
Attempt saved. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Mohammed Al Owais (Saudi Arabia).
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Ali Lajami.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔 进球，艾默里克·拉波尔特 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the box misses to the left following a corner.

qualifiers.fifaAssistField: Goals.IdAssistPlayer empty in FIFA detail snapshot

events.description: 奥亚萨瓦尔 进球，丹尼·奥尔莫 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 塞勒姆·阿尔道萨里 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 亚马尔射门偏出。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Abdulelah Al Amri (Saudi Arabia) right footed shot from more than 35 yards misses to the left. Assisted by Musab Al Juwayr following a fast break.

events.description: 阿姆里·阿卜杜拉射门偏出。 穆萨布·阿尔朱韦尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) hits the bar with a left footed shot from a difficult angle and long range on the left.
Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Mohammed Al Owais (Saudi Arabia). Assisted by Rodri.

events.description: 亚马尔射正。 罗德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the right side of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 亚马尔射门偏出。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Saudi Arabia. Musab Al Juwayr is caught offside.
Foul by Dani Olmo (Spain).
Attempt missed. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) left footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the right.
Corner, Saudi Arabia. Conceded by Pau Cubarsí.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Rodri (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Álex Baena.

events.description: 罗德里射门偏出。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Saud Abdulhamid.
Attempt blocked. Salem Al Dawsari (Saudi Arabia) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.

events.description: 塞勒姆·阿尔道萨里射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Saudi Arabia. Musab Al Juwayr is caught offside.
Foul by Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain).
First Half ends, Spain 3, Saudi Arabia 0.

events.description: 阿卜杜拉·阿尔罕丹 登场，穆萨布·阿尔朱韦尔 离场
耶里米·皮诺 登场，亚马尔 离场
费兰·托雷斯 登场，奥亚萨瓦尔 离场
穆罕默德·坎诺 登场，阿卜杜拉·阿尔凯巴里 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Spain 3, Saudi Arabia 0.
Offside, Saudi Arabia. Salem Al Dawsari is caught offside.
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Saud Abdulhamid.

events.description: 哈桑阿尔坦巴蒂 进球

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Marc Cucurella (Spain) left footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the centre of the goal by Mohammed Al Owais (Saudi Arabia).

Attempt saved. Pedro Porro (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Mohammed Al Owais (Saudi Arabia). Assisted by Pau Cubarsí with a through ball.

events.description: 佩德罗·波罗射正。 保罗·库巴尔西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Ferran Torres (Spain) header from the centre of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Mohammed Al Owais (Saudi Arabia).
Foul by Marc Cucurella (Spain).
Foul by Pedro Porro (Spain).

events.description: 穆罕默德·坎诺 黄牌

qualifiers.espnText: Rodri (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Yéremy Pino (Spain).
Foul by Ferran Torres (Spain).
Attempt missed. Ferran Torres (Spain) right footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Mikel Merino with a through ball.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯射门偏出。 米克尔·梅里诺参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Ali Lajami.
Offside, Spain. Rodri is caught offside.
Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 法比安·鲁伊斯 登场，佩德里 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Abdullah Al Hamddan (Saudi Arabia) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Unai Simón (Spain).
Foul by Yéremy Pino (Spain).
Foul by Marc Cucurella (Spain).
Foul by Aymeric Laporte (Spain).

events.description: 艾默里克·拉波尔特犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Mohamed Kanno (Saudi Arabia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 哈立德阿尔加纳姆 登场，纳赛尔·阿尔道萨里 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Spain. Ferran Torres is caught offside.
GOAL OVERTURNED BY VAR: Ferran Torres (Spain) scores but the goal is ruled out after a VAR review.
VAR Decision: No Goal Spain 4-0 Saudi Arabia.
Attempt blocked. Mikel Merino (Spain) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Fabián Ruiz.

events.description: 米克尔·梅里诺射门被封堵。 法比安·鲁伊斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ferran Torres's stoppage-time goal was disallowed for offside.
